name: Surviving Mormonism with Heather Gay
overview: Heather Gay explores the secrets and sins behind the Mormon church, fracturing the church's seemingly perfect veneer to expose the secrets that have been kept behind closed doors. Heather has impactful conversations with abuse survivors, ex-Mormons and former LDS church leaders.

trailers.title: Get a Sneak Peek of Surviving Mormonism with Heather Gay
